name: product_design
purpose: Route Loop tasks to Product Design workflows for UI context, UX audit, ideation, prototype build, and design QA.

routing_rules: load product-design:index when the plugin is mentioned
use get-context before ideation or UI build
do not build without a visual target unless a focused design workflow supplies one

template.next_recommendation: Provide product_design_brief, Figma file, screenshot, URL, or code target before Product Design execution.
